channel.title: bothSidesHeadlinesNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from bothSidesHeadlinesNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Emory professors take on their own university after arrests at 2024 Israel-Hamas war protest
item.description: Three professors at Emory University have filed a lawsuit claiming the school violated its free speech policies during a 2024 campus protest over the ...

item.title: Congress keeps holding all-nighters, creating dysfunction after dark
item.description: Late-night votes are an age-old pressure tactic for congressional leaders in both major political parties

item.title: Amnesty International and rights groups issue a World Cup travel advisory for the US
item.description: Amnesty International and U.S. civil rights groups have issued a “World Cup travel advisory," warning visitors about “rising authoritarianism and incr...

item.title: Meet the baby koala hiding in its mom’s pouch at a Florida zoo’s new Outback habitat
item.description: The Palm Beach Zoo in Florida has two reasons to celebrate

item.title: Top Iran diplomat set to travel to Pakistan as US takes new step to ease flows of oil and gas
item.description: Iran’s top diplomat is expected to travel to Pakistan by this weekend for talks, two Pakistani officials told The Associated Press on Friday
